_comment: [IT version: domain-config-snippet.it.json] Example block to paste into your cowork_domains.json, under your real domain's key. Replace api_url/api_token/UUID/URLs with your own values.

content.tone: Practical, direct, real examples, step-based structure with ## headings. No literal translations, no reposting.
content.research: Prioritize verified content: if the source is thin, expand with web research, don't invent facts, data, or quotes.

social.format:
Single string: '=== FACEBOOK ===

<fb post>

=== LINKEDIN ===

<linkedin post>'

facebook.structure: Hook + 2-3 lines of benefit + CTA with {{ARTICLE_URL}} + hashtags

linkedin.structure: Hook + key point + takeaway + CTA with {{ARTICLE_URL}} + hashtags

cover.image_style: cinematic dark background, neon accent lighting, editorial magazine quality, sharp focus
cover.instructions: 1. Extract a strong claim from the editorial angle. 2. Insert the subject using <<<ELEMENT_ID>>> as a placeholder. 3. Leave a third of the image empty (text zone). 4. Do NOT put text in the prompt: add_caption.py adds it afterwards.

sources._comment: Optional: only needed if you use sources.php for a registry of blogs/channels to monitor
